profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

equipment.name: Aspect armor
equipment.description: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Crystal body
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Toughness. Unique.

equipment.name: Eldar jetbike
equipment.description: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a twin shuriken catapult and the ability "Jet bike". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Faolchu's wings
equipment.description: The model gains +6" Movement and the ability "Jump pack". Additionally, it gains the "Sky Dive" ability (see Swooping Hawks). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Fire blade
equipment.description: One melee weapon of the model gains Precision(5+) and cumulative -2 AP. Unique. Can't be combined with other blades.

equipment.name: Forcefield
equipment.description: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Ghosthelm
equipment.description: The model ignores the first Perils of the warp attack of the game.

equipment.name: Heavy armor plating
equipment.description: The model gains a 3+ save.

equipment.name: Mandiblaster
equipment.description: During the model's initiave step, roll a D6. On a 4+, one enemy unit in melee suffers an automatic wound with S:4 AP:-2 D:1.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.description: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Paragon of fate
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Toughness, Wounds and Attacks. The model and its attached unit may re-roll any single die per activation. Unique.

equipment.name: Paragon of war
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Strength, Toughness, Wounds and Attacks. It can chose a single Exarch power. Unique.

equipment.name: Phoenix gem
equipment.description:
Roll a die the first time the model is eliminated: 
1,2 - Remove the model.
3,4 - Set it back up with 1 wound. 
5,6 - Set it up again with 2 wounds. Unique.

equipment.name: Psychic mastery
equipment.description: The models gains +1 to all tests for manifesting a psychic power.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.description: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Rune armor
equipment.description: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Runes of warding
equipment.description: Add +1 to rolls to deny enemy psychic powers.

equipment.name: Shrine relic
equipment.description:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Spirit stones
equipment.description: The model can manifest and deny an additional psychic power per turn.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.description: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.description: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.description: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Vaul's cuirass
equipment.description: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Warp jump generator
equipment.description: The model gains +6" Movement and the ability "Jump pack". Additionally, it gains the "Shunting" ability (see Warp Spiders). Only for infantry.

equipment.name: EXARCH POWERS
equipment.description: EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS EXARCH POWERS

equipment.name: Bladestorm
equipment.description: The model and its unit trigger the "Shuriken" special rule on each to wound roll.

equipment.name: Burning heat
equipment.description: Ranged weapons of the model gain an additional -1 AP against units in cover.

equipment.name: Crack shot
equipment.description: One ranged weapon of the model gets the "Seeking" ability each round.

equipment.name: Crushing blows
equipment.description: The model may re-roll one to wound or armor penetration roll in melee.

equipment.name: Defensive stance
equipment.description: The model may use Defensive fire twice when getting charged.

equipment.name: Dragon's bite
equipment.description: Ranged weapons of the model gain a cumulative AT(1).

equipment.name: Graceful avoidance
equipment.description: The model and its unit got a 4+ invulnerability save against melee attacks.

equipment.name: Heartstrike
equipment.description: Melee attacks of the model gain Deadly(5+). If the model already has the rule, increase Deadly(x+) by 1. For example Deadly(5+) becomes Deadly(4+).

equipment.name: Lightning attacks
equipment.description: The model and its unit may consolidate 6" after winning a melee combat. If it consolidates into an enemy unit, that unit may not use Defensive Fire.

equipment.name: Piercing strike
equipment.description: Melee attacks of the model gain Armor piercing(5+).

equipment.name: Rapid redeployment
equipment.description: The model and its unit gain the "Hit & Run" ability.

equipment.name: Reaper's reach
equipment.description: Ranged weapons of the model and its attached unit gain +6" range.

equipment.name: Scorpion's sting
equipment.description: Melee attacks of the model gain Precision(5+).

equipment.name: Skyhunter
equipment.description: All ranged weapons of the model gain Anti-Air.

equipment.name: Stand firm
equipment.description: The model and its unit gain the "Objective secured!" ability.

equipment.name: Surprise assault
equipment.description: If the model used the "Shunting" ability this round, it may shoot one additional time with each equipped Death spinner. If the model used the "Sky dive" ability this round, it doubles their shots with a Hawk's talon or Lasblaster.

equipment.name: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT
equipment.description: VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT VEHICLE EQUIPMENT

equipment.name: Crystal targeting matrix
equipment.description: The model ignores negative to hit modifiers from equipment or abilities.

equipment.name: Ghostwalk matrix
equipment.description: The model gains "Move through cover".

equipment.name: Holo-field
equipment.description: Roll one die for each glancing and penetrating hit against the model. You may substitute one of the following vehicle damage results with your own roll.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.description: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.description: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deep strike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Spirit stones
equipment.description: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.description:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Star engines
equipment.description: The model gains the "Fast" ability.
